direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
Here's what I understand:

- **Concept 1** = Knockaround "FAST LANES" product-name hero card: bold uppercase product name headline on the left with a short descriptive paragraph underneath, product anchored on the right showing the front face cropped off the edge, clean white background. **Concept 2** = Outback Blue product fidelity reference (matte black frame, blue mirror lenses, zebra-pattern inner arms).
- I'll recreate concept 1's layout with DuberyMNL Outback Blue: headline "**OUTBACK BLUE**" (the product's actual name) + a short copy line leaning into the lens character ("Matte flat-top frames with vibrant blue-mirror polarized lenses, built for Manila sun."). Product cropped off the right edge in front-facing angle, clean white bg, charcoal sans-serif matching concept 1's hierarchy.
- Branding stays subtle — DUBERY wordmark reads natively on the temple arm, no overlaid logo. 1:1 square format as specified.

Hit Generate when ready.
